title: Trilokpur
tagline: Trilokpur — spiritual town of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Trilokpur (Hindi: त्रिलोकपुर) is a Hindu temple site in Himachal Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Trilokpur (Hindi: त्रिलोकपुर) is a Hindu temple site in Himachal Pradesh, India. It is located on an hillock about 24 km south-west of Nahan at an elevation of about 430 m. The temple is an amalgam of Indo-Persian styles of architecture. The name Trilok Pur means a triangle of three Shakti Temples in the area.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kala Amb
topPlaces.description: Kala Amb is the industrial capital of the Sirmaur district in Himachal Pradesh. It is a small town and an industrial area near Nahan which is the district headquarter of Sirmaur district in the state of Himachal Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Suketi
topPlaces.description: Suketi is a village in Sirmaur District, Himachal Pradesh, India. It has Asia's oldest Fossil park Shivalik Fossil Park.

topPlaces.name: Sangrani
topPlaces.description: Sangrani is a small village of Naraingarh Tehsil, Ambala district, in the state of Haryana, India. It is situated in the foothills of the Shiwalik mountain range and on the bank of Arun River which pours along with Markanda River which is a spiritual and holy river for the local mass.

topPlaces.name: Roranwali
topPlaces.description: Roranwali is a village in Hanumangarh district, Rajasthan state of western India. The town of Hanumangarh is the district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Nahan
topPlaces.description: Nahan is a town located in the Sirmaur district of the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. It serves as the administrative headquarters of Sirmaur district.

items.note: Kala Amb is the industrial capital of the Sirmaur district in Himachal Pradesh. It is a small town and an industrial area near Nahan which is the district headquarter of Sirmaur district in the state of Himachal Pradesh, India.
Suketi is a village in Sirmaur District, Himachal Pradesh, India. It has Asia's oldest Fossil park Shivalik Fossil Park.

Sangrani is a small village of Naraingarh Tehsil, Ambala district, in the state of Haryana, India. It is situated in the foothills of the Shiwalik mountain range and on the bank of Arun River which pours along with Markanda River which is a spiritual and holy river for the local mass.
Roranwali is a village in Hanumangarh district, Rajasthan state of western India. The town of Hanumangarh is the district headquarters.
Nahan is a town located in the Sirmaur district of the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. It serves as the administrative headquarters of Sirmaur district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Trilokpur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Trilokpur is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Ambala Cantt Junction (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Trilokpur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Trilokpur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Trilokpur?
faq.a: Stays in Trilokpur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Trilokpur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kala Amb, Suketi, Sangrani, Roranwali, Nahan.
